summary: Iteration 65: Chinese Sky Culture Addition - All tests passed. Backend returns 5 cultures (was 4) including Chinese Sky with 5 constellations (Qing Long, Bai Hu, Zhu Que, Xuan Wu, Zi Wei Yuan). Each constellation uses Chinese Five Elements (Wood, Metal, Fire, Water, Earth) and has complete mythology. Frontend displays Chinese Sky button in World Skies panel, constellations render in red (#EF4444).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 verified Chinese Sky culture addition to Star Chart. Backend: GET /api/star-chart/cultures returns 5 cultures (mayan, egyptian, australian, lakota, chinese). GET /api/star-chart/cultures/chinese returns 5 constellations with correct Five Elements and mythology. Frontend: Chinese Sky appears in World Skies panel, constellations display in red (#EF4444), Mythology button shows constellation stories.
